name: skimflow-ai
description: Read faster with RSVP, AI summarization, and smart formatting.

scripts.version:manifest: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = require('./package.json'); const manifest = require('./public/manifest.json'); manifest.version = pkg.version; fs.writeFileSync('./public/manifest.json', JSON.stringify(manifest, null, 2));"

author: rajivnayanc
